CustomField.description: This field is used for Eloqua Integration to provide a simplified naming convention for Stage
CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(StageName) ,"Abandoned","Abandoned" ,"Abandoned (E-Com & E-Proc)","Closed Won" ,"Bid defense and technical negotiation","Prove" ,"Bid/Quote Preparation & Submission","Develop" ,"Closed Lost","Closed Lost" ,"Closed Lost (E-Com & E-Proc)","Abandoned" ,"Closed Won","Closed Won" ,"Closed Won Reagent","Closed Won" ,"Contract negotiation","Negotiation" ,"E-Launch - Closed/Won/Monitor - 100%","Closed Lost" ,"Initial Qualification","Create/Plan" ,"Order deferred","Closed Lost" ,"Order lost","Closed Lost" ,"Order won","Closed Won" ,"Stage 1 - Create/Plan","Create/Plan" ,"Stage 1 - Identification E-Com & E-Proc","Create/Plan" ,"Stage 1 - Qualification","Create/Plan" ,"Stage 1 - Qualification/Relating","Create/Plan" ,"Stage 2 - Needs Analysis","Qualify" ,"Stage 2 - Needs Analysis/Discovery","Qualify" ,"Stage 2 - Needs Analysis/Strategy","Qualify" ,"Stage 2 - Qualify","Qualify" ,"Stage 3 - Advocating/Value Proposition","Develop" ,"Stage 3 - Develop","Develop" ,"Stage 3 - Presentation/Demo (E-Com)","Develop" ,"Stage 3 - Solution Differentiation","Develop" ,"Stage 4 - Bid Preparation & Submission","Prove" ,"Stage 4 - Kickoff Meeting (E-Proc)","Prove" ,"Stage 4 - Objection Handling","Prove" ,"Stage 4 - Prove","Prove" ,"Stage 5 - Customization/Implementation","Negotiation" ,"Stage 5 - Negotiate","Negotiation" ,"Stage 5 - Negotiation","Negotiation" ,"Stage 5 - Preferred","Negotiation" ,"Stage 5 - Supporting/Objection Handling","Negotiation" ,"Stage 6 - Implement","Negotiation" ,"Stage 6 - Implement (Closed)","Closed Won" ,"Stage 6 - Negotiating/Forecast","Negotiation" ,"Stage 7 - Submit Order","Closed Won" ,"Stakeholder relationship development","Qualify" ,"Zero Stage","Zero Stage" ,TEXT(StageName))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used for Eloqua Integration to provide a simplified naming convention for Stage
CustomField.label: fxSimplified Stage Name
